title: Paleontology & Mass Extinction Events

big_five.object: Big Five mass extinctions: EML depth analysis

Permian_Triassic.why: CO₂ flux = EML-2; pH = -log[H+] = EML-2; temperature = EML-2

KPg.why: Impact energy = EML-2; nuclear winter = EML-∞ (impact⊗climate=cross-type)

big_five.pattern: ALL Big Five: TYPE2 Horizon, shadow=2 — real physical drivers

analysis.time_scale: 10-30 Myr recovery: EML-2 (exponential approach to new K)
analysis.opportunistic_radiation: First responders: EML-1 (unconstrained exp growth) → EML-2 (competition)

key_innovations.why: Major body plan innovations post-extinction: categorification (TYPE3)
key_innovations.example: KPg → mammalian radiation: morphological EML-∞ (body plan diversification)

recovery.new_finding: Post-extinction KEY INNOVATIONS = TYPE3 CATEGORIFICATION: EML-k → EML-∞

analysis.body_size: Body size effect: log(body mass) → EML-2 (log-linear selectivity)
analysis.geographic_range: Range size: larger range = lower extinction risk = EML-2
analysis.metabolic_rate: Metabolic rate scaling: EML-2 (Kleiber: B ~ M^{3/4})

fossil_shadow.observation: Fossil record = EML-2 shadow of EML-∞ extinction events
fossil_shadow.why: What we measure (species counts, range sizes) = EML-2; the extinction itself = EML-∞
fossil_shadow.new_theorem: FOSSIL RECORD SHADOW THEOREM: fossil_record(EML-2) = shadow(extinction event(EML-∞))

background.object: Background vs mass extinction: depth separation

background.why: Stochastic background: EML-2 (log of rate = EML-2)

analysis.distinction: Background=EML-2; Mass=EML-∞: fundamentally different mathematical objects

verdicts.big_five: ALL Big Five: TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2 (real physical drivers)
verdicts.fossil_shadow: FOSSIL RECORD = EML-2 SHADOW of EML-∞ extinction events

key_theorem: Fossil Record Shadow Theorem (S338): The fossil record is the EML-2 shadow of EML-∞ extinction events. ALL Big Five mass extinctions are TYPE2 Horizon events with shadow=2 (driven by real physical measurements: temperature, pH, flux). Background extinction = EML-2 (Poisson process). Mass extinction = EML-∞ (cross-type: background×catastrophe). These are fundamentally different mathematical objects. NEW: Post-extinction key innovations = TYPE3 categorification: morphological body plan diversification = EML-k→EML-∞. Selectivity patterns (range, size, metabolism) = EML-2 throughout.
rabbit_hole_log: All Big Five: TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2 (real physical drivers)
NEW: Fossil record = EML-2 shadow of EML-∞ events
